body:
"The update for January 2024 has been published by the Office for Health Improvement and Disparities (OHID).

There are updates to 2 sets of factsheets; both have been extended with new monthly data for July to September 2023:


  place of death factsheet for integrated care boards (ICBs)
  care home factsheet for England and unitary authorities


The palliative and end of life care profiles are presented in an interactive tool which aims to help local government and health services improve care at the end of life.

"
